issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Nextra docs site with install tabs, copy-code, Steps, and a Callout
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to ad-hoc markdown headings and CSS for blockquote callouts; treatment configures nextra({ theme, themeConfig, defaultShowCopyCode }) and imports Callout/Tabs/Tab/Steps from nextra/components.

scenarios.name: Custom sidebar order with separator between basic and advanced sections
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests numeric filename prefixes for ordering and misses the framework feature entirely; treatment supplies a folder-level _meta.json with string labels and a typed separator entry exactly matching the SKILL.md.
